title: Work Lock
description: Schema for cross-session work lock files that prevent duplicate issue assignment across concurrent orchestrator sessions.

issue_number.description: The GitHub issue number being locked.

session_id.description: The orchestrator session ID that holds this lock.

claimed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the lock was first acquired.

hostname.description: Hostname of the machine that acquired the lock.

pid.description: Process ID of the session that acquired the lock.

heartbeat.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last heartbeat update. Used for stale detection.

ttl_seconds.description: Time-to-live in seconds. If now - heartbeat > ttl_seconds, the lock is considered stale.
